name: Coleslaw
directions: Shred the cabbage.
Mix together the rest of the ingredients and toss with the cabbage.
Keeps inthe refigerator and may be mixed a day or so ahead.

similar.name: Fast and Easy Kfc Cole Slaw

name: Grandma Martha's Cole Slaw
directions: Chop together cabbage, carrots, and green onion.
Add salt and pepper (to taste).
Add vinegar, and sugar.
Add Miracle Whip (just enough to coat).
Mix together and chill before serving.

similar.name: Fast and Easy Kfc Cole Slaw

name: Fast and Easy Kfc Cole Slaw
directions: Combine miracle whip with sugar in a large bowl.
Mix well with electric beater until sugar is dissolved.
Add cabbage, carrot and onion mixture and toss well. (be sure the cabbage and carrot are chopped into very small pieces, about the size of rice.)

Cover and chill at least 2 hours, preferably over night, before serving. To make things even easier i usually just buy the pre packaged cole slaw bags in the produce dept. they have the carrots and cabbage already chopped. i just chop them up smaller and use that instead of cutting up my own fresh ingredients.

name: Creamy Coleslaw
directions: in a small bowl combine mayo, salt, sugar, and half and half. whisk together until smooth. whisking is the key to this recipe as it makes the mixture creamy. pour mixture over  cole slaw mix and fold together until mixture evenly covers slaw. refrigerate for a few hours before serving -- overnight is best.

name: Buttermilk Coleslaw
directions: Toss the shredded cabbage with 1 teaspon slat in a colander or strainer and let stand until wilted, at least 1 hour. Rinse the cabbage and pat dry.
Combine cabbage and carrot in a large bowl.
Stir remaining ingredients well in a small bowl. Pour over wilted cabbage and refrigerate, covered, until ready to serve.

name: Pineapple Cole Slaw
directions: Combine green pepper, apple, salt, sugar, vinegar, and cabbage. Top with carrot and pineapple.

similar.name: Fast and Easy Kfc Cole Slaw

name: Super Easy & Delicious Coleslaw
directions: Mix cole slaw mix and onion together.  In separate bowl, whisk together mayo, vinegar and sugar.  Pour over slaw mix and onion.  For best results, let sit overnight.

similar.name: Fast and Easy Kfc Cole Slaw

name: Sweet 'n' Sour Cabbage Saute
directions: Heat oil in skillet, add onion, and saute 3 to 5 minutes or until transparent.  Add cabbage and saute another 3 minutes, or until just tender.
Remove from heat.  Stir in vinegar, sugar, salt, and nectarines.

similar.name: Fast and Easy Kfc Cole Slaw

name: Quick and Yummy Coleslaw
directions: In large bowl, mix Miracle Whip, lemon juice, sugar, and salt.
Add coleslaw mix and toss.
Put in refridgerator until ready to eat.

similar.name: Fast and Easy Kfc Cole Slaw
